---
title: "The Memory of the City"
author: "Rein Geurtsen"
description: "treating the city as a physical palimpsest"
categories: [map based]
date-format: "YYYY"
date: "1988"
fig-cap-location: bottom
---

## Why use this method? 


## How does it work?


## You are ready to use this method if


## Questions you can answer 


## Steps


## Tools {#tools}


## Cases


## References


## Exercises
